Problem

Up to 90% of travellers never buy upgrades

Upgrades are the highest-margin product in travel.

Target: any travel checkout — OTAs, airlines, rail, hotels.

✈
Your flightSeat upgrade

Extra legroom

More space to stretch out for the whole flight.
✓ Up to 7cm more legroom
✓ Priority boarding
✓ Closer to the front
$29 one-time
Add to trip
No thanks
💸
– $29 lost
Near-100% margin — gone the moment they skip the upgrade.
Solution

Pay with attention

Travellers complete brand-sponsored tasks —
the brands cover the upgrades.

The concept is proven — first 50 transactions processed

PayAttention fee

Every actor in the value chain wins

  • Users complete tasks → get a free upgrade.
  • Advertisers get users on a CPA basis with zero risk → pay a 20% fee.
  • Travel agencies, airlines, hotels supply traffic → increase revenue for free.
Win · Win · Win

Why now?

📈
CAC becomes extremely high.
Paying a user's bill is now cheaper than buying their attention.
💰
Brands want positive unit economics.
Not impressions.

Today: mobile subscriptions
Then: a payment rail for small transactions

Financial plan

We plan to reach $3.6M ARR at M12 and $60M at M36

This means 41 apps and 4,680 orders per day in year 1. Break-even by M9.
